refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on monitoring energy use, controlling operations to reduce energy, and optimizing system performance aligns with the high safety criticality and measurable KPI.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by measuring energy_per_ton over the evaluation period and comparing to E_target; validate monitoring data accuracy, control response effectiveness, and optimization algorithm performance.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage per ton moved.
FR3: Optimize system parameters to sustain or improve energy efficiency.

candidate_dps: DP1: Deploy energy and load sensors integrated with telemetry system.
DP2: Implement adaptive control algorithms for vehicle operation parameters.
DP3: Use data analytics and machine learning for continuous optimization.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1, DP2, DP3 combined to address monitoring, control, and optimization respectively.

potential_sources: Data dependency between monitoring and control modules.
Feedback loop between optimization and control parameters.
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is expected and managed via well-defined telemetry and tasking interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes reliable sensor data and network connectivity.
Risk of control algorithm failure impacting safety and efficiency.
Optimization effectiveness depends on quality and volume of data.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure robust fault detection and fallback modes in control DP to mitigate safety risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system integration including energy monitoring, control logic, and optimization services.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Used for transmitting sensor data and receiving control commands.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends optimized operational parameters to Vehicle module.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Issues alerts if energy efficiency or safety thresholds are breached.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes energy efficiency functions, minimizing diffusion.
Executes control commands but does not own monitoring or optimization logic.
Limited role in energy efficiency; mainly remote control.
Receives alerts but does not implement energy efficiency functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy efficiency functions are best contained within the NGHE Solution module to ensure cohesive control and monitoring with minimal diffusion.
containment_risks: Potential complexity in NGHE Solution module due to integration of multiple DPs.
Interface latency or failure could impact real-time control.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Consider modular sub-division within NGHE Solution for scalability and maintainability.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FRs are clearly refined and mapped to logical DPs with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Integration complexity within NGHE Solution module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores favor centralizing energy efficiency in NGHE Solution, reducing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational KPIs.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of FRs to NGHE Solution with defined interfaces to Vehicle and Safety Services.

recommended_revisions: Add fault tolerance mechanisms in control DP and IM.
Define sub-modules within NGHE Solution for better ownership clarity.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, recommended revisions on fault tolerance and modularization within NGHE Solution should be addressed before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operations to minimize energy usage per ton moved.
FR3: Optimize system parameters to sustain or improve energy efficiency.

revise.why: To introduce modular sub-division within NGHE Solution for scalability, maintainability, and fault tolerance.

assumptions: Reliable sensor data and network connectivity.
Effective integration of control and optimization algorithms.
open_risks: Control algorithm failure impacting safety and efficiency.
evidence_needed: Performance data from telemetry and control systems.
